## What this changes

A short description of the change and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / infrastructure
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (and `RUN_INTEGRATION=1 pytest -q` if the change touches the ingestion path)
- [ ] Docs / CHANGELOG updated if behavior or configuration changed
- [ ] No secrets, real data, or personal information in the diff

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
